steps.title: Compare the unusual canvases
steps.content: Mihai Radu used concrete, an unconventional surface for graffiti at the time. His son Andrei also uses an unusual surface: fragmented ice floes. The relationship between the sentences is similarity.

steps.title: Reject the wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, but the two artists make parallel choices. Choice B signals emphatic confirmation, but Andrei's project is a separate similar case. Choice C signals enumeration even though no list order has been set up. The answer is D.
